transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Why are you parking so far from the science building?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: All the nearby spaces were taken before I arrived.

transcript.question_intro: Why did the man park far away?

questions.prompt: Why did the man park far away?

choices.text: He wanted to get some exercise.
The closer parking spaces were full.

questions.explanation: He explains that no nearby parking spaces were available.
questions.evidence: All the nearby spaces were taken before I arrived.
